title: schoenoxiphium lanceum
intro: Schoenoxiphium lanceum, a species of sedge, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is native to South Africa and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Schoenoxiphium lanceum include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a diuretic. Schoenoxiphium lanceum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
